headline: Coca-Cola Is Crushing the S&P 500 and Nasdaq-100. But There's an Even Better Reason to Buy the Stock in July.
summary: Coca-Cola offers one of the best ways to participate in the stock market while generating reliable passive income.

headline: Goldman Sachs doubles down on Applied Materials stock target
summary: Semiconductor equipment makers have spent most of this decade at the mercy of a single question. How long will chipmakers keep spending? For years, nobody knew the answer. Fabrication plants planned in short cycles, and equipment suppliers assumed the boom would eventually slow down. That ...

headline: These 5 Chip Stocks Are Riding the AI Fab Spending Wave
summary: Applied Materials just blew past its own growth forecast, and the companies supplying every HBM stack and gate-all-around node are collecting the checks. Five picks-and-shovels stocks sit directly under that spending fire hose, and the one most retail investors cannot name is leading the pack.
